steps.title: Follow the language change
steps.content: The text explains that social-media users first applied meng- to cat images, then began attaching it to existing words online, and now the affix has started entering spoken Bahasa Indonesia.

steps.title: Draw the broad conclusion
steps.content: A compares informal and formal language study, which the text does not do. B wrongly treats Bahasa Indonesia as exceptional even though similar examples occur in other languages. C claims social media may mislead linguists, which is unsupported. Social media is helping language change happen. The answer is D.
